lesson.menu_desc: Reading + imperatives and directions to welcome a visitor and show them around the office -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 16 -- Welcoming a Visitor -- Imperatives & Directions
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Maísa de Oliveira Santos | Aula 16 -- Welcoming a Visitor

paras: Today is a special day at the office. David, Maísa's business partner from the United States, arrives in São Paulo for the first time. Maísa waits for the visitor at the reception with a big smile.
"Hello, David! Welcome to Brazil. Please come in," Maísa says. David is very happy to be here. "Thank you, Maísa. It is great to see the office."
"Follow me. This way, please," Maísa says. "Go straight, and then turn left. The elevator is there. The meeting room is on the second floor." They take the elevator and go up together.
"Here we are. Have a seat," Maísa says. "Would you like some coffee?" David sits down and looks around. Everything is ready for the visitor. "You are a great host, Maísa," he says with a smile.

reading.prompt: What is the best one-line summary of this text?
choices: David gets lost and cannot find the office in São Paulo.
Maísa welcomes David to the office and shows him the way to the meeting room.
David shows Maísa a new office in the United States.

items: David is visiting São Paulo for the first time.
The text says: "David... arrives in São Paulo for the first time."
The meeting room is on the first floor.
It is on the second floor: "The meeting room is on the second floor."
The text says: "Would you like some coffee?"
David is not happy to be at the office.
He is happy: "David is very happy to be here."

listenings.text: Good morning, and welcome to our office. Please come in. Are you here for the meeting on the second floor? Let me help you. First, go straight to the end of this hall. Then turn left. The elevator is on your right. Take the elevator to the second floor, and the meeting room is the first door. Please have a seat there. If you need help, just call me at the reception. Have a great day!

Hello, and welcome! I am so happy you are finally here. Please come in and follow me. This way to the meeting room. Be careful. Go straight, and then turn left at the coffee machine. Here we are. Have a seat, please. Would you like some water or a coffee? Our manager is going to arrive in five minutes. Please make yourself at home. If you need anything, just ask me. Enjoy your visit!

extra_audio.text: Good morning, David. Welcome to our office. Please come in. Follow me. This way to the elevator. The meeting room is on the second floor. Have a seat. Would you like some coffee?
